title: The Last Days of Frankie the Fly
original_title: The Last Days of Frankie the Fly
overview: Dreaming of ascending the underworld ladder and gaining revenge on his sadistic boss, Sal, a Mafia flunky, Frankie, tries to take a step in the right direction by "saving" an exploited, drug-addicted porn actress, Margaret.
